name: Artichoke Tomato Alfredo
recipeIngredient: 4 to 5 fresh tomatoes, chopped into large chunks
1 medium Onion, chopped and 2 tbsp fresh garlic (or 1 tbsp garlic powder)
1/2 cup Fresh basil, chopped (or 3 tbsp chopped dried basil)
1/2 cup (or more) non-fat soy milk or low-fat rice milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare fettucini, macaroni, or spaghetti noodles until al dente.
2. In a large saucepan, sauté onion, garlic, and basil in a little of the liquid from the can of artichokes over medium heat.
3. Add chopped artichokes and continue to cook until heated through, about 5 minutes.
4. Stir in whole wheat flour, soy milk or rice milk, and additional seasoning to achieve desired thickness.
5. Simmer for a few minutes to allow flavors to meld.
6. Cook the pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
7. Drain the pasta and toss with the artichoke sauce.
8. Serve hot, garnished with extra basil if desired.
Serves 2 (each serving: Calories 210, Fat 1.5 g., Carbohydrate 46 g., Protein 10.7 g.)
